Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 689

ENPM687 Digital Forensics and Incidence Responses (3 Credits) Students will implement a robust incident response methodology, including proper forensic handling of evidence, and cover legal aspects of national and international law regarding forensics. The bulk of the course covers evidence acquisition, preservation, analysis and reporting on multiple platforms.

Prerequisite: Experience with both Windows and Unix-based operating systems, including using the command line.
